---
title: "P8106-Midterm"
output: github_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---

```{r}
load("datA.RData")
datA
```

```{r}
str(datA)
summary(datA)
```

## EDA
```{r}
# numeric variables
eda_numeric <- function(data, var, response = "log_PFS") {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  
  # Histogram
  hist(data[[var]],
       main = paste("Histogram of", var),
       xlab = var,
       col = "lightblue",
       border = "white")
  
  # Scatter plot
  plot(data[[var]], data[[response]],
       xlab = var,
       ylab = response,
       main = paste(var, "vs", response),
       pch = 16, col = "darkblue")
  
  # Add linear trend line
  abline(lm(data[[response]] ~ data[[var]]), col = "red", lwd = 2)
  
  # Boxplot
  boxplot(data[[var]],
          main = paste("Boxlot of", var),
          xlab = var,
          col = 'green4')
  
}
```

```{r}
# categorical variables
eda_categorical <- function(data, var, response = "log_PFS") {
  boxplot(data[[response]] ~ data[[var]],
          main = paste("Boxplot of", response, "by", var),
          xlab = var,
          ylab = response,
          col = "lightgreen")
}
```

```{r}
numeric_vars <- c("age", "bmi", "tumor_size", "lymph_nodes", "Ki67")
categorical_vars <- c("menopause", "race", "tumor_grade", "ER", "PR", 
                      "HER2", "stage", "surgery", "chemo", "hormonal_therapy")
```

```{r}
for (v in numeric_vars) {
  eda_numeric(datA, v)
}
```

```{r}
for (v in categorical_vars) {
  eda_categorical(datA, v)
}
```



## Model fitting
```{r}
# Base linear model
lm1 <- lm(log_PFS ~ . - id, data = datA)
summary(lm1)
```


```{r}

```
